zh.lifeSummary: 當Louise de Tingry於大約1137年出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯廷格利時，她的父親Bernard de Tingry de Bournonville27歲，母親Louise DE PREURES-DE MONTCAVREL19歲。她於大約1151年與Gilbert De Renty在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯雷迪結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1175年在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯雷迪享年39歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Louise de Tingry于大约1137年出生在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯廷格利时，她的父亲Bernard de Tingry de Bournonville27岁，母亲Louise DE PREURES-DE MONTCAVREL19岁。她于大约1151年与Gilbert De Renty在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯雷迪结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1175年在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯雷迪享年39岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Tingry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cornish: from the Breton personal name Tangi, Tanguy (see Tanguy ).

variants.name: Tanguy
meanings: Breton: from the personal name Tanguy, originally a warrior's nickname, composed of tan ‘fire’ and ki ‘dog’. This surname is also found in Britain. Compare Tanguay .

variants.name: Tangney
meanings: Irish (Kerry): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Teangana ‘descendant of Teangana’, a personal name of unexplained etymology.

variants.name: Tingue
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Delphin, Yvrose.
Americanized form of an unidentified surname, possibly Cornish   Tingey  .

nameMeanings.name: Louise
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of Louis , introduced to England in the 17th century. Like Louisa , it has remained perennially popular and is currently frequently used as a component of compound names such as Ella-Louise, Sophie-Louise, and Tia-Louise.

en.lifeSummary: When Louise de Tingry was born about 1137, in Tingry, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, her father, Bernard de Tingry de Bournonville, was 27 and her mother, Louise DE PREURES-DE MONTCAVREL, was 19. She married Gilbert De Renty about 1151, in Renty, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1175, in Renty, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, at the age of 39.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Louise de Tingry est née environ 1137, à Tingry, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Bernard de Tingry de Bournonville, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Louise DE PREURES-DE MONTCAVREL, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Gilbert De Renty environ 1151, à Renty, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1175, à Renty, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, à l’âge de 39 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Louise de Tingry um 1137 in Tingry, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Bernard de Tingry de Bournonville 27 und ihre Mutter Louise DE PREURES-DE MONTCAVREL 19. Sie hat um 1151 in Renty, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich Gilbert De Renty geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1175 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Renty, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Louise de Tingry è nata il circa 1137 nel Tingry, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, sua padre, Bernard de Tingry de Bournonville, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Louise DE PREURES-DE MONTCAVREL, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Gilbert De Renty circa 1151, nel Renty, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1175, nel Renty, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, all'età di 39 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Louise de Tingryが約1137年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスティングリーで生まれた時，父Bernard de Tingry de Bournonvilleは27歳，母Louise DE PREURES-DE MONTCAVRELは19歳であった。約1151年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスレントイでGilbert De Rentyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1175年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスレントイで39歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Louise de Tingry(이)가 대략 1137년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 틴그리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Bernard de Tingry de Bournonville(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Louise DE PREURES-DE MONTCAVREL(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 대략 1151년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 렌티에서 Gilbert De Renty(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1175년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 렌티에서 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Louise de Tingry nasceu aproximadamente 1137, em Tingry, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Bernard de Tingry de Bournonville, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Louise DE PREURES-DE MONTCAVREL, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Gilbert De Renty aproximadamente 1151, em Renty, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1175, em Renty, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, com 39 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Louise de Tingry родилась около 1137 г. в местности тингри, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, её отцу по имени Bernard de Tingry de Bournonville было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Louise DE PREURES-DE MONTCAVREL, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gilbert De Renty около 1151 г. в местности ренти, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1175 г. в местности ренти, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция в возрасте 39 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Louise de Tingry nació aproximadamente 1137, en Tingry, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Bernard de Tingry de Bournonville, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Louise DE PREURES-DE MONTCAVREL, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Gilbert De Renty aproximadamente 1151, en Renty, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1175, en Renty, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, a la edad de 39 años.
